narrative.label: The Mission
narrative.content: Building a resilient, multi-region payment processor handling $2B+ in annual volume with zero downtime requirements.

narrative.label: Key Achievement
narrative.content: 99.999% Availability achieved during the peak holiday season with 10x traffic spike.

narrative.label: The Challenge
narrative.content: Developing a high-throughput consensus mechanism for private enterprise networks.

narrative.label: The Result
narrative.content: Reduced transaction latency by 400ms while maintaining strict causal ordering across 50 nodes.

narrative.label: The Problem
narrative.content: Securing sensitive data flows at the network edge for a global logistics fleet.

narrative.label: The Solution
narrative.content: Implemented a Zero Trust architecture using eBPF for deep packet inspection with minimal overhead.

archive.title: Real-time Analytics Engine
archive.mission: Designing a low-latency data pipeline to ingest 1M events/sec.
archive.outcome: -85% reduction in compute costs by migrating heavy processing from Python to Rust.

archive.title: ML Model Orchestrator
archive.mission: Automating the deployment and monitoring of 500+ micro-models.
archive.outcome: Standardized the MLOps pipeline, reducing deployment time from days to minutes.

archive.title: Core Banking API Gateway
archive.mission: Modernizing legacy SOAP interfaces for mobile banking consumers.
archive.outcome: Unified 15 legacy services under a single GraphQL gateway with strict rate limiting.
